headline: Agriculture Stock Up 53% Draws $12 Million Bet. Here's What Long-Term Investors Should Know
summary: This agribusiness firm delivers grain, renewables, and plant nutrient solutions to commercial and industrial clients worldwide.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Texas Pacific Land (TPL) After Its Strong 2024 Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Texas Pacific Land at around US$532 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article breaks down what the current market price might be implying. The stock has logged returns of 0.7% over 7 days, 24.9% over 30 days, 78.7% year to date, 17.2% over 1 year, 202.2% over 3 years and 232.3% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how its valuation compares with that track record. Recent coverage has focused on...
